notes:
Xbox one controller acts strange, Do not touch triggers on controller, they act the same as the Left Stick and will constantly hold a direction after having been moved once. Just don't touch them and they won't activate.

RB and Y are swapped, this is a problem on windows as well. (https://steamcommunity.com/app/766680/discussions/0/1651045226223757437/)
title: Punch Line
